prompt: Review a C# test file with 3 empty [Skip] shells (one with false 'verified in integration tests' claim), 1 constructor-only test, 1 happy-path test. Grep confirms the claimed integration test does not exist.

assertions.text: Flags the 'verified in integration tests' claim as false (grep confirms zero matches)
Identifies all three skipped tests as empty shells with no arrange/act/assert
Flags 'TODO: fix later' as a forbidden skip pattern (no tracking link or exit criterion)
Flags 'flaky' skip as forbidden (no tracking link, masks a real issue)
Flags Service_CanBeConstructed as a forbidden false-coverage-inflation test
Recommends tier escalation (unit -> integration with Docker) for the 48-hour DateTime test instead of skip
Recommends a Known Gaps / TESTING.md ledger entry for any skip that survives
